_comment: Update pointer for the 'Update Library' flow. A device fetches this file, compares latest.libraryVersion to its installed catalog, and (if newer) downloads latest.url (the catalog manifest), then fetches each board listed in manifest.boards in order, validates them, and loads them via loadLibrary(boards, { libraryVersion }).

latest.notes: Minor: adds the AstroPixelsPlus (Holo) board — friendly Marcduino holo aliases (*ON/OF/RD/HP position/HW wag/HN nod/HRS radar/@6-8 legacy) plus the full native HP grammar (@HP<dev> LED effects 01-07/clear-auto, servo preset/RC/random/wag/nod/twitch, sequence modes). 28 commands; native LED numbering solid=05/rainbow=06/short=07.
